2.  **Identify segments:** I'll note the start and end times for each continuous block of English speech.
3.  **Merge segments:** If English segments are adjacent or separated only by very short pauses or non-English sounds that don't break the flow significantly (though the prompt says "no other language present between the end of one segment and the start of the next"), I will merge them.
